en.title: To what extent is a security concept available describing minimum requirements regarding the physical and environmental security for prototype protection?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A security concept under consideration of the following aspects is established: 
 - stability of outer skin,
 - view and sight protection,
 - protection against unauthorized entry and access control,
 - intrusion monitoring,
 - documented visitor management,
 - client segregation.

Requisiti (should):
+ Perimeter security.

it.title: In che misura è disponibile un concetto di sicurezza che descriva i requisiti minimi relativi ai prototipi?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A security concept under consideration of the following aspects is established: 
 - stability of outer skin,
 - view and sight protection,
 - protection against unauthorized entry and access control,
 - intrusion monitoring,
 - documented visitor management,
 - client segregation.

Requisiti (should):
+ Perimeter security.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.1: To what extent is a security concept available describing minimum requirements regarding the physica

en.title: To what extent is perimeter security existent preventing unauthorized access to protected property objects?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized access to properties is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Suitable barriers are in place such as:
  - artificial barriers (fence systems, walls),
  - technical barriers (detection),
  - natural barriers (growth, vegetation).

it.title: In che misura esiste una sicurezza perimetrale che impedisce l'accesso non autorizzato alle aree protette?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized access to properties is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Suitable barriers are in place such as:
  - artificial barriers (fence systems, walls),
  - technical barriers (detection),
  - natural barriers (growth, vegetation).

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.2: To what extent is perimeter security existent preventing unauthorized access to protected property o

en.title: To what extent is the outer skin of the protected buildings constructed such as to prevent removal or opening of outer-skin components using standard tools?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized access to buildings/security areas is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Solid construction (masonry, concrete, reinforced concrete, or prestressed concrete).
+ Windows and doors in the outer skin are to be built in compliance with RC2 or better.

it.title: In che misura l'involucro esterno degli edifici protetti è costruito in modo da resistere all'accesso non autorizzato?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized access to buildings/security areas is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Solid construction (masonry, concrete, reinforced concrete, or prestressed concrete).
+ Windows and doors in the outer skin are to be built in compliance with RC2 or better.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.3: To what extent is the outer skin of the protected buildings constructed such as to prevent removal o

en.title: To what extent is view and sight protection ensured in defined security areas?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized viewing of new developments needing high or very high protection is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Sight protection through relevant glass surfaces is ensured.
+ View into defined security areas through open doors/gates/windows is prevented.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for protecting vehicles classified as requiring protection against unauthorized view.

it.title: In che misura è garantita la protezione visiva e dalla vista nelle aree di sicurezza definite?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Unauthorized viewing of new developments needing high or very high protection is not possible.

Requisiti (should):
+ Sight protection through relevant glass surfaces is ensured.
+ View into defined security areas through open doors/gates/windows is prevented.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for protecting vehicles classified as requiring protection against unauthorized view.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.4: To what extent is view and sight protection ensured in defined security areas?

en.title: To what extent is the protection against unauthorized entry regulated in the form of access control?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ At least one of the following three requirements must be implemented:
  - mechanical locks with documented key assignment,
  - electronic access systems with documented authorization assignment,
  - personal access control including documentation.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for protecting vehicles classified as requiring protection against unauthorized access.

it.title: In che misura la protezione contro l'ingresso non autorizzato è regolamentata nelle forme richieste?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ At least one of the following three requirements must be implemented:
  - mechanical locks with documented key assignment,
  - electronic access systems with documented authorization assignment,
  - personal access control including documentation.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for protecting vehicles classified as requiring protection against unauthorized access.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.5: To what extent is the protection against unauthorized entry regulated in the form of access control?

en.title: To what extent are the premises to be secured monitored for intrusion?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Intrusion monitoring of the premises to be secured is ensured:
  - An intrusion detection system exists which complies with DIN EN 50131 or conforms to VDS or similar and functions with alarm tracking to a certified security service or control unit (e.g., according to DIN 77200, VdS 3138),
  - or 24/7 guarding by a certified security service.
+ Alarm plans are available.
+ Timely alarm processing is ensured.

it.title: In che misura i locali da proteggere sono monitorati per rilevare intrusioni?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Intrusion monitoring of the premises to be secured is ensured:
  - An intrusion detection system exists which complies with DIN EN 50131 or conforms to VDS or similar and functions with alarm tracking to a certified security service or control unit (e.g., according to DIN 77200, VdS 3138),
  - or 24/7 guarding by a certified security service.
+ Alarm plans are available.
+ Timely alarm processing is ensured.

evidences.description: Screenshot o export del sistema di monitoraggio

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.6: To what extent are the premises to be secured monitored for intrusion?

en.title: To what extent is a documented visitor management in place?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Registration obligation for all visitors.
+ Documented non-disclosure obligation prior to access.
+ Publication of security and visitor regulations.
+ Country-specific legal provisions regarding data protection are to be observed.

it.title: In che misura è in atto una gestione documentata dei visitatori?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Registration obligation for all visitors.
+ Documented non-disclosure obligation prior to access.
+ Publication of security and visitor regulations.
+ Country-specific legal provisions regarding data protection are to be observed.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.7: To what extent is a documented visitor management in place?

en.title: To what extent is on-site client segregation existent?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Spatial separation by staff-related or technical measures is in effect according to the following aspects:
  - customers, and/or
  - projects,
  - where segregation is not in effect, explicit approval by the customer is required.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for implementing client segregation for vehicles classified as requiring protection.

it.title: In che misura esiste una segregazione dei clienti in loco?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Spatial separation by staff-related or technical measures is in effect according to the following aspects:
  - customers, and/or
  - projects,
  - where segregation is not in effect, explicit approval by the customer is required.

Requisiti aggiuntivi per alta protezione:
+ The spatial situation is also suitable for implementing client segregation for vehicles classified as requiring protection.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.1.8: To what extent is on-site client segregation existent?

en.title: To what extent are non-disclosure agreements/obligations existent according to the valid contractual law?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A non-disclosure agreement: 
  - between contractor and customer (company level),
  - with all employees and project members (personal obligation).
+ Country-specific legal provisions regarding data protection are to be observed.

it.title: In che misura esistono accordi/obblighi di riservatezza in conformità ai requisiti del cliente?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A non-disclosure agreement: 
  - between contractor and customer (company level),
  - with all employees and project members (personal obligation).
+ Country-specific legal provisions regarding data protection are to be observed.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.1: To what extent are non-disclosure agreements/obligations existent according to the valid contractual

en.title: To what extent are requirements for commissioning subcontractors known and fulfilled?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Approval by the original customer.
+ contractually valid non-disclosure agreement exists:
  - between contractor and subcontractor (company level),
  - with all employees and project members of the subcontractor (personal obligation).
+ Ensuring compliance with the security requirements of the actual customer (proof is obtained).
+ Proof of the subcontractor’s compliance with minimum requirements for prototype protection (e.g., certificate, attestation) is provided.

it.title: In che misura i requisiti per l'incarico di subappaltatori sono noti e soddisfatti?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Approval by the original customer.
+ contractually valid non-disclosure agreement exists:
  - between contractor and subcontractor (company level),
  - with all employees and project members of the subcontractor (personal obligation).
+ Ensuring compliance with the security requirements of the actual customer (proof is obtained).
+ Proof of the subcontractor’s compliance with minimum requirements for prototype protection (e.g., certificate, attestation) is provided.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.2: To what extent are requirements for commissioning subcontractors known and fulfilled?

en.title: To what extent do employees and project members evidently participate in training and awareness measures regarding the handling of prototypes?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Ensuring execution of trainings / awareness programs by the management.
+ Training of employees and project members when joining the project regarding the handling of prototypes.
+ Regular (at least annual) training of employees regarding the handling of prototypes.
+ Ensuring knowledge among employees and project members regarding the respective protection needs and the resulting measures within the company.
+ Mandatory participation of each employee and project member in the trainings and awareness measures.
+ The completed measures are to be documented. 
+ The training concept for prototype protection is an integral part of the general training concept (see also control question 2.1.3 Information Security).

it.title: In che misura i dipendenti e i membri del progetto partecipano evidentemente a formazioni specifiche?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Ensuring execution of trainings / awareness programs by the management.
+ Training of employees and project members when joining the project regarding the handling of prototypes.
+ Regular (at least annual) training of employees regarding the handling of prototypes.
+ Ensuring knowledge among employees and project members regarding the respective protection needs and the resulting measures within the company.
+ Mandatory participation of each employee and project member in the trainings and awareness measures.
+ The completed measures are to be documented. 
+ The training concept for prototype protection is an integral part of the general training concept (see also control question 2.1.3 Information Security).

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.3: To what extent do employees and project members evidently participate in training and awareness meas

en.title: To what extent are security classifications of the project and the resulting security measures known?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Ensuring that the security classification and requirements in relation to the project progress are made known to each project member.
+ Consideration of step-by-step plans, measures for secrecy and camouflage, development policies.
+ The requirements are considered as a requirement regarding the information security of the project (see Controls 1.2.3 and 7.1.1 Information Security).

it.title: In che misura sono note le classificazioni di sicurezza del progetto e le misure di sicurezza derivanti?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Ensuring that the security classification and requirements in relation to the project progress are made known to each project member.
+ Consideration of step-by-step plans, measures for secrecy and camouflage, development policies.
+ The requirements are considered as a requirement regarding the information security of the project (see Controls 1.2.3 and 7.1.1 Information Security).

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.4: To what extent are security classifications of the project and the resulting security measures known

en.title: To what extent is a process defined for granting access to security areas?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Responsibilities for access authorization are clearly specified and documented.
+ A process for new assignments, changes and revocations of access rights is in place.
+ Code of conduct in case of the loss/theft of access control means.

it.title: In che misura è definito un processo per la concessione dell'accesso alle aree di sicurezza?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Responsibilities for access authorization are clearly specified and documented.
+ A process for new assignments, changes and revocations of access rights is in place.
+ Code of conduct in case of the loss/theft of access control means.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.5: To what extent is a process defined for granting access to security areas?

en.title: To what extent are regulations for image recording and handling of created image material existent?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Approval procedures for image recording.
+ Specification for classification/categorization of image material.
+ Secure storage of image material.
+ Secure deletion/disposal of image material no longer required.
+ Secured transmission/shipping of image material to authorized recipients only.

it.title: In che misura esistono regolamenti per la registrazione di immagini e la gestione delle immagini create?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Approval procedures for image recording.
+ Specification for classification/categorization of image material.
+ Secure storage of image material.
+ Secure deletion/disposal of image material no longer required.
+ Secured transmission/shipping of image material to authorized recipients only.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.6: To what extent are regulations for image recording and handling of created image material existent?

en.title: To what extent is a process for carrying along and using mobile video and photography devices in(to) defined security areas established?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Specification for carrying along (e.g., sealed/unsealed, etc.).
+ Specification for use (e.g., phone calls, photography, etc.).

it.title: In che misura esiste un processo per portare e utilizzare dispositivi mobili di registrazione video e fotografica?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ Specification for carrying along (e.g., sealed/unsealed, etc.).
+ Specification for use (e.g., phone calls, photography, etc.).

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.2.7: To what extent is a process for carrying along and using mobile video and photography devices in(to)

en.title: To what extent are transports of vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection arranged according to the customer requirements?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the transport of vehicles, components and parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented. 
+ The security requirements defined by the customer are known and observed.
+ The logistics/transport companies explicitly approved by the customer are commissioned.
+ A process for reporting any security-relevant events to the customer is described and implemented.

it.title: In che misura i trasporti di veicoli, componenti o parti sono classificati come richiesto?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the transport of vehicles, components and parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented. 
+ The security requirements defined by the customer are known and observed.
+ The logistics/transport companies explicitly approved by the customer are commissioned.
+ A process for reporting any security-relevant events to the customer is described and implemented.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.3.1: To what extent are transports of vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection ar

en.title: To what extent is it ensured that vehicles, components, and parts classified as requiring protection are parked/stored in accordance with customer requirements?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ The customer-specific requirements for parking/storage are verifiably known and observed.

it.title: In che misura è garantito che veicoli, componenti e parti classificati come richiesto siano protetti?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ The customer-specific requirements for parking/storage are verifiably known and observed.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.3.2: To what extent is it ensured that vehicles, components, and parts classified as requiring protection

en.title: To what extent are the predefined camouflage regulations implemented by the project members?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ The requirements for using the respective camouflage are known to the project members.
+ Any changes to the camouflage are made upon documented agreement with the customer.
+ A process for the immediate reporting of any damages to the camouflage is described and implemented.

it.title: In che misura le normative di mimetismo predefinite sono attuate dal progetto?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ The requirements for using the respective camouflage are known to the project members.
+ Any changes to the camouflage are made upon documented agreement with the customer.
+ A process for the immediate reporting of any damages to the camouflage is described and implemented.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.4.1: To what extent are the predefined camouflage regulations implemented by the project members?

en.title: To what extent are measures for protecting approved test and trial grounds observed/implemented?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the use of trial vehicles classified as requiring protection on test and trial grounds is described and implemented. 
+ The following aspects must be known to users of test and trial grounds: 
  - a current list of customer-approved test and trial grounds
  - code of conduct for ensuring undisturbed trial operation 
  - customer-defined protective measures These are implemented.

it.title: In che misura sono osservate le misure per la protezione dei campi prova e di prova approvati?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the use of trial vehicles classified as requiring protection on test and trial grounds is described and implemented. 
+ The following aspects must be known to users of test and trial grounds: 
  - a current list of customer-approved test and trial grounds
  - code of conduct for ensuring undisturbed trial operation 
  - customer-defined protective measures These are implemented.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.4.2: To what extent are measures for protecting approved test and trial grounds observed/implemented?

en.title: To what extent are protective measures for approved test and trial drives in public observed/implemented?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the operation of test vehicles classified as requiring protection on public roads is described and implemented.
+ Protective measures defined by the customer are known and observed.
+ The code of conduct in case of special incidents (e.g., breakdown, accident, theft...) is known and observed.

it.title: In che misura sono attuate le misure protettive per le prove su strada approvate in aree pubbliche?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for the operation of test vehicles classified as requiring protection on public roads is described and implemented.
+ Protective measures defined by the customer are known and observed.
+ The code of conduct in case of special incidents (e.g., breakdown, accident, theft...) is known and observed.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.4.3: To what extent are protective measures for approved test and trial drives in public observed/impleme

en.title: To what extent are security requirements for presentations and events involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection known?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for presentations and events involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented.
+ Established and customer-approved security concepts (organizationally, technically,
staff-related).
+ Code of conduct in case of special incidents.

it.title: In che misura sono soddisfatti i requisiti di sicurezza per presentazioni ed eventi che coinvolgono prototipi?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for presentations and events involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented.
+ Established and customer-approved security concepts (organizationally, technically,
staff-related).
+ Code of conduct in case of special incidents.

evidence_requirement.notes: ISA 8.5.1: To what extent are security requirements for presentations and events involving vehicles, components

en.title: To what extent are the protective measures for film and photo shootings involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection known?
en.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for film and photo shootings involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented.
+ Proof of approval for the presumably used premises.
+ Established and customer-approved security concepts (organizationally, technically,
staff-related).
+ Code of conduct in case of special incidents.

it.title: In che misura sono attuate le misure protettive per riprese fotografiche e cinematografiche che coinvolgono prototipi?
it.description:
Requisiti (must):
+ A process for obtaining customer-specific requirements for film and photo shootings involving vehicles, components or parts classified as requiring protection is described and implemented.
+ Proof of approval for the presumably used premises.
+ Established and customer-approved security concepts (organizationally, technically,
staff-related).
+ Code of conduct in case of special incidents.
